parameters.query: SELECT item_code, item_name, uom FROM wms.wms_items_cache WHERE item_code = $1 LIMIT 1

={{ 'SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT ItemCode, ItemName, InvntryUom AS uom, CodeBars AS barcode, OnHand AS onHand, IsCommited AS committed, OnOrder AS onOrder FROM OITM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ItemCode = \'' + $('提取物料号').item.json.code.replace(/'/g, "''") + '\'' }}

SELECT d.doc_type, d.doc_number, d.sap_doc_num, COALESCE(dl.warehouse_code, d.warehouse_code) AS warehouse_code, d.wms_status, d.doc_date,
       d.created_by, dl.line_num, dl.item_code,
       dl.item_name,
       COALESCE(NULLIF(dl.uom, ''), ic.uom, '') AS uom,
       dl.planned_qty, dl.actual_qty, dl.bin_location, COALESCE(t.batch_number, dl.batch_number, '') AS batch_number, dl.serial_number,
       dl.from_bin, dl.to_bin,
       COALESCE(TO_CHAR(t.transaction_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '') AS transaction_time, t.from_bin AS tx_from_bin, t.bin_location AS tx_to_bin, t.quantity AS tx_qty, t.performed_by AS tx_operator, t.from_warehouse AS tx_from_warehouse, t.warehouse_code AS tx_warehouse_code
FROM wms.wms_documents d
INNER JOIN wms.wms_document_lines dl ON d.id = dl.document_id LEFT JOIN wms.wms_items_cache ic ON dl.item_code = ic.item_code
LEFT JOIN wms.wms_transactions t ON d.id = t.document_id AND dl.id = t.line_id
WHERE d.company_code = $1 AND ($2 = '' OR $2 = 'ALL' OR d.doc_type = $2) AND ($3 = '' OR d.id = ANY(string_to_array($3, ',')::int[]))
AND dl.actual_qty <> 0
ORDER BY d.doc_type, d.wms_status, d.created_by, t.transaction_time DESC, COALESCE(dl.warehouse_code, d.warehouse_code), d.doc_number, dl.item_code

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms.wms_transactions WHERE company_code = $1 AND DATE(transaction_time) = CURRENT_DATE) AS today_transactions,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms.wms_documents WHERE company_code = $1 AND wms_status = 'in_progress') AS in_progress,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms.wms_documents WHERE company_code = $1 AND wms_status = 'completed' AND DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE) AS today_completed,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms.wms_documents d WHERE d.company_code = $1 AND d.wms_status NOT IN ('completed','exported') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM wms.wms_transactions tx WHERE tx.document_id = d.id)) AS pending_export,
  COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms.wms_stock_snapshot WHERE snapshot_date = (CURRENT_DATE - 1) AND company_code = $1), 0) AS yesterday_snapshot_count,
  COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - (SELECT MAX(synced_at) FROM wms.wms_items_cache)))/3600, 9999) AS items_sync_hours_ago,
  COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - (SELECT MAX(synced_at) FROM wms.wms_locations_cache)))/3600, 9999) AS locations_sync_hours_ago,
  COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - (SELECT MAX(synced_at) FROM wms.wms_bins_cache)))/3600, 9999) AS bins_sync_hours_ago

={{ "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), (SELECT MAX(UpdateDate) FROM OITM WITH (NOLOCK)), 120) AS sap_items_date, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), (SELECT MAX(UpdateDate) FROM OWHS WITH (NOLOCK)), 120) AS sap_locations_date, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), (SELECT MAX(CreateDate) FROM OBIN WITH (NOLOCK)), 120) AS sap_bins_date, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), (SELECT MAX(d) FROM (SELECT MAX(UpdateDate) AS d FROM ORDR WITH (NOLOCK) UNION ALL SELECT MAX(UpdateDate) FROM OPOR WITH (NOLOCK) UNION ALL SELECT MAX(UpdateDate) FROM OWOR WITH (NOLOCK)) x), 120) AS sap_oms_date" }}

SELECT TO_CHAR((SELECT MAX(synced_at) FROM wms.wms_items_cache), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS pg_items_synced, TO_CHAR((SELECT MAX(synced_at) FROM wms.wms_locations_cache), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS pg_locations_synced, TO_CHAR((SELECT MAX(synced_at) FROM wms.wms_bins_cache), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS pg_bins_synced, TO_CHAR((SELECT MAX(snapshot_date) FROM wms.wms_stock_snapshot WHERE company_code = $1), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS latest_snapshot_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms.wms_stock_snapshot WHERE company_code = $1) AS snapshot_count, TO_CHAR((SELECT MAX(sap_update_date::timestamp) FROM oms.orders WHERE company_code = $1), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS pg_oms_synced
